feedItems.description: allocated £4.1m to Culture & Leisure (≈£22 per resident)
allocated £8.9m to Environment & Streets (≈£48 per resident)
allocated £7.0m to Council Running Costs (≈£37 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £111 (4.8%) to £2404
